headline: Run Linux Containers Natively on Apple Silicon
lede: Apple’s new containerization tool bridges the gap between macOS desktop environments and cloud-native infrastructure. By leveraging native virtualization, it executes Linux workloads with minimal overhead and full OCI compatibility.

headline: Standardize AI Coding Workflows with Modular Skill Sets
lede: Software agents often struggle with consistency in complex development tasks. This framework provides a disciplined blueprint of twenty-three engineering skills to ensure agents follow test-driven, production-grade logic.

headline: Run High-Performance Medical NLP Locally on Your Hardware
lede: OpenMed enables clinical entity extraction without compromising sensitive patient data through cloud-based APIs. The framework optimizes performance across CPU, CUDA, and Apple Silicon, delivering secure medical insights locally.

headline: Codify Product Management Best Practices into AI Assistants
lede: Transform your AI chat interface into a strategic project management partner. This library of sixty-eight specialized skills integrates expert methodologies directly into your development workflow for seamless feature planning.

headline: Audit AI Agent Skills for Malicious Patterns Before Deployment
lede: As third-party agent skills proliferate, the risk of supply chain vulnerabilities and prompt injection grows. SkillSpector provides a rigorous, two-stage analysis to identify risk factors in AI code before execution.

headline: Automate Digital Footprint Investigations Across Thousands of Sites
lede: Maigret streamlines the arduous process of mapping identities across fragmented online platforms. It flows through massive dataset queries to extract metadata and synthesize investigation summaries with surgical precision.

headline: Demystify Modern AI Coding Assistants Through Internal Prompt Analysis
lede: This repository provides a rare, transparent view into the proprietary system directives that govern leading AI coding agents. It serves as a vital scholarly resource for understanding the structural logic of today’s LLM-driven development tools.

headline: Manage Knowledge Bases with Local-First Git Integration
lede: Tolaria rejects the fragility of cloud-hosted note-taking in favor of local, version-controlled text files. Built with a focus on data sovereignty, it ensures your knowledge base remains independent of proprietary subscription models.

headline: Superpowers Framework Crosses Milestone in AI Developer Productivity
lede: The Superpowers project has seen massive adoption by engineering teams seeking to standardize autonomous coding. It enforces high-context, test-driven development workflows that turn generic chatbots into reliable, process-driven contributors.

headline: Deploy Frictionless, Encrypted Backups Across Any Cloud Infrastructure
lede: Restic offers a rugged, command-line approach to data protection that thrives in diverse environments. Its efficient deduplication and local encryption ensure that your critical snapshots remain secure and easily verifiable.
